Decision framework comparing ripgrep, ag (the_silver_searcher), ack, and grep for repository-scale code search on a 50k-file tree in 2026, covering raw search throughput and indexing/startup cost, regex/PCRE flavor and feature parity (smart-case, multiline, fixed-string, file-type filters), gitignore and hidden-file handling, Unicode/binary behavior, ergonomics and default output, packaging and platform availability across Linux/macOS/Windows, and the current maintenance state and release cadence of each tool. Decision-only.
